subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of the Spirit, sent down in truth from the presence of One mighty, powerful and omnipotent, giving glad tidings unto mankind of the Day of Gathering [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الروح نزلت بالحق من لدن قادر مقتدر قدیرا و تبشر الناس بیوم الجمع و
subcodes.subjects: @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
